dublinCore.dc:title: 119 HR 1689 PCS: To require the Secretary of Homeland Security to designate Haiti for temporary protected status.
dublinCore.dc:rights: Pursuant to Title 17 Section 105 of the United States Code, this file is not subject to copyright protection and is in the public domain.

form.current-chamber: IN THE SENATE OF THE UNITED STATES

action.action-desc: Read the second time and placed on the calendar

form.official-title: To require the Secretary of Homeland Security to designate Haiti for temporary protected status.

section.header: Designation of Haiti for temporary protected status
section.text: Notwithstanding any other provision of law, the Secretary of Homeland Security shall designate Haiti for temporary protected status until the date that is 3 months after January 20, 2029.

attestation-group.attestation-date: Passed the House of Representatives April 16, 2026.

endorsement.action-desc: Read the second time and placed on the calendar
